ticket_title: Implement queue/detail/step surfaces for core process cluster

viewport_standard.minimum_support: 1366x768 CSS viewport: no broken layout, no horizontal scroll, primary decision/blocker visible
viewport_standard.primary_acceptance: 1440x900 CSS viewport: page job, object, status, blocker, next action and audit/service boundary visible without page scroll
viewport_standard.desktop_comfort: 1920x1080 CSS viewport: secondary proof/context zones can remain visible with more breathing room

implementation_summary: S034 /advisory/review-queue was refactored from dashboard-heavy queue plus secondary metric blocks into a queue/detail/step surface.
S035 /advisory/triggers/:id/review was refactored from long dossier-style trigger detail into one compact trigger draft governance workbench.

EPIC-09 visible surfaces now expose contract-backed process IDs, internal-only draft boundary, audit requirement and no-overclaim posture without claiming advice, release, export or client visibility.
Reusable compact variants were added for SCF advisory boundary and D4 detail proof while keeping existing test anchors.

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEB_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3092 pnpm playwright test tests/route-smoke.spec.ts --grep "034|035|advisory|UX-WORKBENCH-001|UX-DETAIL-003" --workers=1
PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEB_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3092 pnpm playwright test tests/scf-p04-p06-flow-ui.spec.ts --grep "P05 advisory boundary" --workers=1
PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEB_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3092 pnpm playwright test tests/ui-state-boundaries.spec.ts --grep "static audit-facing panels" --workers=1
PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEB_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3092 pnpm playwright test tests/ux-master-detail-surface.spec.ts --grep "S034" --workers=1

known_non_ticket_validation_noise: Earlier broad combined Playwright run included pre-existing failures outside S034/S035: /documents, /client/home and compliance release copy checks. Those routes were not modified in this ticket and were not used as EPIC-09-IMPL-01B acceptance.
Parallel Playwright runs can collide with an already-running Next dev server; final browser validations used PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEB_SERVER=1 against the active proof server.
